description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. Very damaged. Some of the letters have left holes in the page. Might be a deathbed declaration(?) by Abū l-Faraj Hibatallāh (the same as in T-S 8.172?). There are reports of direct speech, including some from a woman. T-S AS 220.80 (PGPID 22931) and T-S AS 220.110 (PGPID 22921) are likely related and/or an indirect join. AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
